channel.title: MBallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from MBallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Tony Hinchcliffe Was Right
item.description: Despite Bad Bunny's arrogance, Puerto Rico would probably more resemble a hellscape than anything else without the patronage of the American people.

item.title: DOD employee moonlighted as money mule for Nigerian fraudsters: Feds
item.description: Federal authorities announced charges Monday against a Defense Department employee they say was secretly working as a money mule for a Nigerian fraud ...

item.title: Ford worker who heckled Trump won't be disciplined or lose job
item.description: The autoworker who heckled President Trump during his visit to a Michigan plant last month will keep his job and won't be disciplined, his union annou...

item.title: Mike Macdonald’s Christian Worship Was The Bright Spot In This Year’s Depraved Super Bowl
item.description: It goes without saying that this year’s Super Bowl was an absolute disaster. From the morally depraved and anti-American halftime show to the terrible...

item.title: Local leaders and lawmen defy Democrat-run states' crackdown on cooperating with ICE
item.description: As Democratic politicians in blue states rush to shut down cooperation with ICE, a rebellion is brewing among conservative local politicians who say t...

item.title: The Trump Administration Defeated The ‘Seditious Six’ By ‘Going On Offense’
item.description: The 'Seditious Six' called for a mutiny, and the administration decided to 'go on offense and make them tap-dance a little.'

item.title: Left-wing upset brewing in New Jersey after pro-Israel push against establishment Democrat
item.description: The left wing of the Democratic Party is on the verge of a win in the race to replace Gov. Mikie Sherrill in New Jersey's 11th Congressional District,...

item.title: A Hong Kong Tragedy — and a Test for the U.S.
item.description: In the wake of Jimmy Lai’s sentencing, the U.S. must stand up for democratic values.

item.title: The Best Chagos Deal Is No Deal
item.description: The Trump administration should step up political pressure on Starmer to change course.

item.title: How Sheikh Tahnoon Bought the UAE’s Way into Trump World
item.description: When Trump won the 2024 election, Tahnoon saw his opportunity to influence the U.S. government.

item.title: Judge orders feds to pay to bring back deported illegal immigrants
item.description: Taxpayers suddenly find themselves on the hook for bringing back illegal immigrants that judges say were wrongly deported.

item.title: Pro-China Forces Sentence Hong Kong Freedom Fighter Jimmy Lai To 20 Years In Prison
item.description: In a further erosion of freedom in Hong Kong, the city’s Chinese-backed government sentenced media mogul and pro-democracy activist Jimmy Lai to 20 ye...

item.title: The Super Bowl Halftime Show Was Literally About Erasing ‘America’
item.description: Bad Bunny naming the entire western hemisphere as one America was an open endorsement of open borders and the implicit rejection of nationhood.

item.title: Goodbye, Kostyantynivka
item.description: Not too long ago, the eastern Ukrainian city helped build my family. Now, the town is little more than ruins.

item.title: Thirty Candles for the Internet’s Foundation
item.description: Internet free speech is celebrating its 30th birthday — if Section 230’s opponents don’t spoil the party, that is.
